title: Ukraine war briefing: Sanctions waiver on Russian oil could end soon, Trump suggests
description: Hopeful mood on war among European leaders at G7 summit; two crew killed in Ukrainian bomber plane crash. What we know on day 1,575
content: The US could soon reinstate sanctions on Russian oil shipments, Donald Trump indicated, as leaders at the G7 summit moved on Tuesday to put the war in Ukraine back on top of their agenda. Trump said the sanctions on Russia – partly waived by the US d... [4459 chars]

title: Iran will have to leave US hours after every World Cup match, official says
description: Mehdi Torabi issued a new visa after previous one expired when team returned to Mexico following the New Zealand game.
content:
United States officials have confirmed that Iran’s team will have to leave the country within hours of the full-time whistle at their World Cup group games in Los Angeles and Seattle.
The response from the World Cup 2026 cohost nation came on Tuesday... [2812 chars]

description: Evolution is all over the place in terms of lifespans, which range from the duration of a quick phone call to animals that may be older than recorded history.

title: World Cup 2026: Haaland rises to the occasion on World Cup debut
description: Erling Haaland has made a habit of scoring debut goals in the big competitions. He did it in the Champions League, the Bundesliga and the Premier League. Now he has done it at the World Cup too.
content:
If there is a stage that is too big for Erling Haaland, we're yet to find it.
